analysis_summary: Video shows a laptop display with anatomical visualization software showing liver/organ models, alongside a haptic feedback device. No FLS task performance is visible - this appears to be medical simulation equipment demonstration or setup rather than actual FLS task execution.
unusable_reason: No FLS task performance visible. Video shows only equipment/software demonstration without any of the five standard FLS tasks (peg transfer, pattern cutting, endoloop, extracorporeal suture, or intracorporeal suture).

frame_analyses.description: Laptop screen showing anatomical liver model with haptic device visible on desk
frame_analyses.observation: No FLS trainer box or task materials visible
